content:
# Session 15 (iter-015) — review summary

## Metadata
- Prover model: opus. Lane: single `prove` lane on `AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/SectionGradedRing.lean`.
- Sorry count (SGR.lean): 7 → 7 (UNCHANGED). Tactic-sorries at 2609 (★), 2904+2912 (B6), 2942 (B7),
  2960/2975/3017 (comm-gated future). No new sorries; none closed.
- Global active sorries: 7 SGR + 4 χ (QuotScheme 123/161/198/225) = 11. RelativeSpec.lean = 0 sorries
  (auditor-confirmed).
- Build: GREEN — `lake build AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.SectionGradedRing` → "Build completed successfully
  (2439 jobs)".
- Targets attempted: ★ `tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor_sheaf` (the assoc-chain crux gating B4/B5). B6/B7 not
  attempted (budget consumed on ★).

## Target: ★ `tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor_sheaf` — PARTIAL (mechanism found, past the 9-iter wall)

### Outcome
Real, compiling progress. The proof body now carries a **verified compiling prefix** that advances the
goal far past the prior wall; ★ still ends in one `sorry` at the residual associator-naturality coherence.
The complete closing mechanism is identified and each step individually verified to fire.

### The key correction to the iter-015 directive (the comp-bridge as written is a NO-OP)
The plan's "VALIDATED" comp-bridge
`have hc : f ≫ g = @CategoryStruct.comp (LocalizedMonoidal …) _ … := fun f g => rfl; simp only [hc]`
is **reflexive** — the ambient `f ≫ g` already elaborates to the `LocalizedMonoidal` copy, so
`simp only [hc]` makes no progress (and `rw [Category.assoc]` still reports "did not find `(?f ≫ ?g) ≫ ?h`").
The bridge only bites when its LHS is keyed to the **explicit native instance**:
```
have hc : ∀ {P Q R : X.Modules} (f : P ⟶ Q) (g : Q ⟶ R),
    @CategoryStruct.comp X.Modules
        (AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.instCategory (X := X)).toCategoryStruct P Q R f g
      = @CategoryStruct.comp (LocalizedMonoidal (sheafificationMon X) (sheafificationW X)
          (localizationUnitIso X)) _ P Q R f g := fun f g => rfl
```
Native instance name = `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.instCategory` with **X implicit** (found via
`set_option pp.all`; `instCategory X` fails "Function expected", `instCategory (X := X)` works). The two
candidates that DON'T work: `inferInstance`/`inferInstanceAs (Category X.Modules)` resolve to the wrong
(reflexive) copy; bogus names `SheafOfModules.instCategorySheafOfModules` / `…Modules.instCategoryModules`
do not exist.

### The diamond (corrected diagnosis)
Exactly two rfl-defeq-but-syntactically-distinct `CategoryStruct.comp` instances:
- `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.instCategory` — the native `X.Modules` comp used by the goal's
  structural `sheafification.map _ ≫ tensorObjAssoc.hom`;
- the `LocalizedMonoidal …` `Category` (= `inferInstanceAs (Category X.Modules)`) used by every
  `Localization.Monoidal.μ … .hom/.inv` factor from `hηL`/`hηR`/`hα`.
`monoidalCategory` introduces NO third Category. `tensorHom_def`/whiskering lemmas re-introduce native
comps, so **`hc` must be INSIDE the big `simp`** (re-fires after each decomposition), not a separate prior
`simp only [hc]`.

### Working recipe (all steps verified via lean_multi_attempt / build)
`simp only [hc, Category.assoc, tensorObj, MonoidalCategory.tensorHom_def, sheafification_map_unit_eq,
Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc, Iso.inv_hom_id_assoc, MonoidalCategory.inv_hom_whiskerRight_assoc,
MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft_hom_inv_assoc, MonoidalCategory.hom_inv_whiskerRight_assoc,
MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft_inv_hom_assoc, Iso.inv_hom_id, Iso.hom_inv_id, Category.comp_id,
Category.id_comp]` flattens, unfolds `tensorObj` (unifying object forms), decomposes `⊗ₘ`, and cancels
every NON-diamond junction. Then `erw [Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc]` cancels the cross-diamond `μ (A) (B⊗C)` pair
(VERIFIED) and `erw [MonoidalCategory.associator_naturality]` fires on the coherence step (VERIFIED).

### Remaining blocker (mechanical, not mathematical)
Residual = genuine associator-naturality: LHS `(α_ A B C).hom` (sheaves) vs RHS
`(α_ (L T A)(L T B)(L T C)).hom` (sheafified presheaves), through counit isos `εc A/B/C`. Every step fires
under `erw`, but **unbounded** `repeat (first | erw …)` hits `(deterministic) timeout at whnf` (200000
heartbeats) — each `erw` is a full cross-diamond defeq search. Closure needs a **bounded, ordered** erw
sequence (~10–20 steps); pinning the exact order needs step-by-step inspection of ~1.2M-char pp.all goals.
NOT a missing-Mathlib / impossibility blocker.

### Attempt log (full code+errors)
See `milestones.jsonl` — 7 attempts with exact `code_tried` + `lean_error` (reflexive bridge no-op →
positional `rw` no-match → 5 instance-name probes → working explicit-instance `simp` → 2 verified `erw`
firings → unbounded-`repeat` heartbeat timeout).

## B6 `tensorPowAdd_assoc`, B7 `sectionsMul_mul_assoc` — NOT STARTED (budget)
Not attempted; budget consumed on the ★ mechanism. B6 is the diamond-free pentagon induction (base reduced
iter-014), bankable independent of ★. B7 assembly gated on ★(→B4→B5) + B6 + a new μ-naturality slide.

## Verification (both highly-recommended subagents dispatched — prover touched the file)
- **lean-auditor** `iter015` (7 must-fix / 2 major / 5 minor): ★ prefix is GENUINE progress, NOT
  laundering; comments accurate; all sorries honestly typed; no stray `set_option` inside proofs; no
  circular deps. 7 must-fix = the standing sorrys (3 SGR active chain + 4 QuotScheme χ scaffolds — all
  honest, not new). 2 major = stale `RelativeSpec.lean:701–709` `functor` docstring (claims `functor`
  /`structureMorphism` are `sorry`; both now concrete) + a stale SGR `.lean` comment (3009–3013).
  Report: `.archon/task_results/lean-auditor-iter015.md`.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** `iter015` (0 must-fix Lean-side / 0 major / 3 minor): Lean faithfully
  follows an adequate blueprint; ★ correctly carries NO false proof-block `\leanok`; all sorries honest.
  CRITICAL finding = the deterministic sync stripped ALL proof-block `\leanok`; **21 are lean_verify-
  confirmed axiom-clean and were restored** (see Blueprint markers below).
  Report: `.archon/task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-iter015.md`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`: **restored 21 proof-block `\leanok`** wrongly stripped by `sync_leanok`
  (2nd consecutive iter — `sync_leanok-state.json`: iter-15 removed 19, added 0). Each was `lean_verify`-
  confirmed CLOSED + axiom-clean (`{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}`, no `sorryAx`) by the
  lean-vs-blueprint-checker. Labels: `lem:isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit`,
  `def:sheafModule_W_isMonoidal`, `def:sheafModule_monoidalStructure`, `cor:sheafTensorObjAssoc`,
  `lem:tensorObjRightUnitor_eq`, `lem:tensorObjUnitIso_eq`, `lem:tensorBraiding_eq`,
  `lem:tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso_eq`, `lem:tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_eq`, `lem:sheafTensorPow_add`,
  `lem:canonical_runit_core`, `lem:tensorPowAdd_zero_right`, `lem:tensorObjUnitIso_hom_sectionsMul`,
  `lem:tensorObjRightUnitor_hom_sectionsMul`, `lem:tensorBraiding_hom_sectionsMul`,
  `lem:sectionsMul_whiskerRight_unit`, `lem:sectionsMul_whiskerLeft_unit`,
  `lem:presheafAssociator_top_apply`, `lem:sheafification_map_unit_eq`, `lem:sectionsCast_refl`,
  `lem:gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast`. Justification: certain (independent fresh-context `lean_verify` on each;
  build green). The remaining proof blocks correctly lack `\leanok` (each `sorryAx`).
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, `cor:sheafModule_braided_symmetric`: added **statement-block `\leanok`**
  — both `\lean` targets (`braidedCategory`, `symmetricCategory`) `lean_verify`-axiom-clean; statement-only
  corollary the sync left unmarked.
- No `% NOTE:` added for the auditor's "Mac Lane coherence" major: the blueprint proof of
  `lem:tensorPowAdd_comm` (tex 1342–1368) ALREADY states correctly that "Mac Lane coherence alone does
  not close the step" and requires invertibility. The error is in the STALE `.lean` comment
  (SGR 3009–3013) which references an old blueprint claim — routed to recommendations (review can't edit
  `.lean`).
- No `\lean{...}` renames (no top-level decls added — only a tactic-local `have hc`). No stale `\notready`
  removed.

## Coverage debt
- `archon dag-query unmatched` = 324 (unchanged vs iter-014). No new SNAP debt: the prover added no
  top-level declarations (only a proof-local `have hc`). Bulk 324 = inherited `Grassmannian.*`/
  `GradedModule.*` out-of-cone extraction artifacts (resolve at merge).
- Blueprint-doctor (iter-015): all findings in DEFERRED chapters (Cohomology_FlatBaseChange covers 2
  non-existent files; broken `\ref`/`\cref`/`\uses` in QuotScheme/GlueDescent/Cohomology) — out-of-cone
  extraction artifacts, resolve at merge. Active chapter clean.
- Checker noted 3 graded-assembly blueprint blocks (`lem:sectionGradedRing_gsemiring`,
  `…_gcommSemiring`, `lem:sectionGradedModule_gmodule`) name Lean constants that don't exist yet
  (honestly unmarked; planned post-assoc-chain). Not new debt.

## Key findings / patterns
- **The comp-instance-diamond is real, but the directive's reflexive comp-bridge was a no-op.** The
  working bridge must be keyed to the explicit native `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.instCategory
  (X := X)`, placed INSIDE the big `simp only` (so it re-fires after `tensorHom_def`/whiskering).
- Cross-diamond cancellations resist positional `rw`/`simp` but fire under `erw`; an unbounded `repeat
  erw` is a heartbeat dead-end — a bounded ordered sequence is required.
- `sync_leanok` is reproducibly mis-stripping verified-axiom-clean proof markers on this large/slow
  chapter (2 iters running). Review restores each time = pure churn; durable fix is sync-side.

## Recommendations for next session
See `recommendations.md`. Headline: close ★ via a BOUNDED ordered `erw` sequence using the working
explicit-`instCategory` bridge (do NOT re-use the reflexive default bridge; do NOT use unbounded `repeat
erw`; do NOT raise maxHeartbeats). If the ordered sequence can't be pinned after a real push → iter-016
escalates to user (per the plan's hard-stop). Land B6 (diamond-free, bankable) regardless.

## Notes (LOW)
- Auditor minor: 2 transitive-sorry decls (`tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor`, `tensorObjAssoc_hom_sectionsMul`)
  correctly lack `\leanok`; 3 invertibility-gated future sorrys honest. Checker minor: stale "as stated
  for ARBITRARY L" SGR comment (signature now `[IsInvertible L]`).
